name: the-eco
description: **The Eco** is a multi-tenant MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node) e-commerce application designed for sustainable, organic, and eco-friendly products. It features tenant-level isolation, unified authentication, Stripe payment integration in Indian Rupees (INR), and roles for Super Admins, Vendors, and Customers.

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
